name: Brischtner Nytlae (Dried Pears Poached in Spice Wine ...
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried pears for one day in advance.
2. Drain the pears and remove them from the soaking liquid.
3. In a saucepan, combine wine, cinnamon stick, granulated sugar, and clove. Bring to a boil.
4. Add the drained pears and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove the pears and set aside.
5. For the sauce, stir honey into red wine and bring to a simmer. Reduce liquid over moderate heat until it is half its original volume. Discard spices.
6. Stir butter into the sauce and add 2-3 drops of lemon juice. Keep warm.
7. To make the rice pudding, bring milk to a boil. Add salt and stir in rice. Cook until tender.
8. Stir butter into the rice pudding. Mix in sugar (if necessary), walnuts, kefir or yogurt, and whipped cream.
9. Serve rice pudding and pears at room temperature on dessert plates.
10. Pour sauce around the pears and rice pudding.
11. Garnish with chopped angelica (or other fruit confits).
